basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India PSB Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India has released the official Inquiry Authority Notification 2026 on its official website. A Inquiry Authority (PSB Officer) vacancy has been announced under the Central Bank of India Inquiry Authority Recruitment 2026. Eligible retired officers not more than 63 years of age, with experience equivalent to Chief Manager & above in Public Sector Banks and the required professional expertise, can apply offline until 31-07-2026. The official notification PDF and offline application details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 63 years of age on date of publication of notification for empanelment.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 63 years (as on the date of publication of notification for empanelment). Age relaxation is not specified in the notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired officers in the rank equivalent to a Chief Manager & above in Public Sector Banks, having necessary skills and experience of working in different areas of Banking or Human Resources or Industrial Relations or have experience of handling departmental inquiries as Inquiring Authority / Presenting Officer / Disciplinary Authority.
qualification.details: Retired from Public Sector Bank's Service on attaining superannuation at the age of 60 years in a cadre of Scale IV & above. Experience of working in different areas of Banking or Human Resources or Industrial Relations or experience of handling departmental inquiries as Inquiring Authority / Presenting Officer / Disciplinary Authority..

salary_details.pay_scale: Lump-sum remuneration based on the scale of the charge sheeted officer and time taken to complete the inquiry.
salary_details.details: Lump-sum remuneration based on the scale of the charge sheeted officer and time taken to complete the inquiry.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Inquiry Authority Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.centralbank.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Inquiry Authority Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://www.centralbank.bank.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central Bank of India PSB Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Inquiry Authority post in Central Bank of India?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Inquiry Authority post in Central Bank of India is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Inquiry Authority position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired officers from Public Sector Banks, holding a cadre of Scale IV and above, with relevant experience in banking, HR, or industrial relations, or in handling departmental inquiries.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 63 years as of the notification publication date for empanelment.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Inquiry Authority role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Personal Interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis for the role of Inquiry Authority.

faq.question: Q7. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: Applications should be superscribed as “Application for the post of Inquiring Authority” and sent to the Chief General Manager - HCM, Central Bank of India, Chander Mukhi, 17th floor, Nariman Point, Mumbai- 400 021.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Inquiry Authority post?
faq.answer: The remuneration is a lump sum based on the scale of the charge sheeted officer and the time taken to complete the inquiry, with specific amounts detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum qualification required?
faq.answer: While the summary mentions a graduate qualification, the detailed eligibility requires retired officers from specific cadres with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.
